title: Malaysian Shrimp Noodle Stir Fry
description: A flavorful stir-fry dish combining Malaysian spices with succulent shrimp and noodles. This recipe is quick to prepare and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook until pink and fully cooked, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the chili flakes, soy sauce, and cooked noodles to the wok.
Stir-fry everything together for 2-3 minutes, until the noodles are well coated.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped green onions, if desired.
